# Static utilities
flex
hidden
sr-only
truncate
italic

# Spacing
p-4
m-2
px-8
-mt-4
p-0
p-px
p-0.5

# Sizing
w-1/2
w-full
w-screen
h-64
size-4

# Colors
bg-blue-500
text-red-500/75
border-green-300

# Typography
text-lg
text-xl
font-bold
leading-tight
tracking-wide

# Borders
rounded-lg
rounded-full
border
border-2

# Flexbox/Grid
flex-1
grid-cols-3
gap-4
col-span-2

# Transforms
translate-x-4
rotate-45
scale-50
-translate-y-1/2

# Transitions
transition
duration-300
ease-in-out

# Filters
blur-md
brightness-75
grayscale

# Variants
hover:bg-blue-500
md:flex
dark:text-white
focus:ring-2

# Arbitrary values
w-[300px]
bg-[#ff0000]
grid-cols-[1fr_auto_2fr]

# Modifiers
bg-blue-500/50
text-black/[.5]

# Negative
-m-4
-translate-x-4
-rotate-12

# Fractions
w-2/3
w-1/4
translate-x-1/2
